data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: Encrypts messages between sender and receiver.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes the Signal Protocol for encryption.

data.title: Two-Factor Authentication
data.description: Adds an extra layer of security during login.
data.technical_spec: Uses SMS or App-based authentication codes.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts periodic evaluations of the security measures.
data.technical_spec: Employs both automated scans and manual pen-testing.

data.title: Firewall Protection
data.description: Prevents unauthorized access to network resources.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes both network-level and host-level firewalls.

data.title: Data Anonymization
data.description: Protects personal user data by making it anonymous.
data.technical_spec: Implements techniques like data masking and tokenization.
